name: <ModelName>_setParameter
title: <ModelName>_setParameter
syntax: long <ModelName>_setParameter( dword index, float values[], dword nrOfValues);
description: Copies the values from an array to a model parameter. The array size must not be smaller than the number of values the parameter has.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Model parameter. You can find the index of the model parameter in the file <ModelName>_M.csv which is located in the destination directory of the code generation, i.e the target directory of the model DLL.
